archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Corporate Light

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-[1.1] font-bold text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-[1.2] font-semibold text-slate-900
scale.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-[1.3] font-semibold text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Crisp Asymmetry

surface_strategies.header: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200. Must have z-50.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background (bg-white), crisp 1px border (border-slate-200). Hover state: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1, border-blue-200. No heavy shadows by default.

buttons.secondary: bg-blue-50 text-blue-800 hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors border border-blue-100

surface_strategies.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all

animations.reveal: staggered fade-up for grid items (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y-4 to 0)

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5. Use Globe or Hexagon icon for the brand logo placeholder alongside typography.

images.description: 3D blue sphere representing Temenos ecosystem, connection, and architecture. Use in Hero section right side.
Corporate team meeting for the About page.
Abstract white/blue architecture representing robust foundation.
Abstract data network for Services (Integration / Cloud).
3D glass blue object for Trust/Security motifs.

pages_structure.Navigation: Sticky header, blur background. Links: Home, About, Why Us, Services, Contact. CTA: Book Consultation. Logo: lucide 'Globe' + 'Sphere IT Solution' text.

Home.Hero: Tetris Grid (cols-12). Left (col-span-7): text-6xl heading, subheadline, Primary CTA (Contact) & Secondary CTA (Services). Right (col-span-5): 3D Sphere Image (hero).
Home.Logos: Trusted by Section: Muted gray text, lucide icons as placeholder logos (e.g., Building, Landmark, Briefcase) distributed evenly.
Home.Services_Preview: 3 Cards (T24 Architecture, Migration, Integration). High contrast.
Home.Why_Us_Preview: Split layout. Image (why_us_architecture) and bullet points.

pages_structure.About: Mission statement (large typography), Temenos Specialization detail, Delivery values. Image (about_team).
pages_structure.Why_Us: Focus on reliability, deep domain expertise, governance. Grid layout.
pages_structure.Services: 6 service blocks (Control Room grid - 3 columns). T24/Transact architecture, Migration/upgrade, Integration/API, Cloud modernization, Managed support, Testing/QA. Use icons for each.

Contact.Layout: 2 Columns. Left: Contact Information (Email, Phone, Offices, Calendly Placeholder CTA). Right: Contact Form.
Contact.Form: Shadcn components (Input, Textarea, Select for 'Service of Interest', Button). Must have data-testid attributes.

pages_structure.Footer: Dark theme footer (bg-slate-900 text-slate-400). Links, copyright, and massive 'Sphere IT Solution' wordmark at the bottom.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, links MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for page layouts.
Use Shadcn UI ONLY for the Contact Form elements (Input, Select, Textarea, Button).
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons. The brand logo should be constructed using <Globe className='text-blue-800'/> accompanied by 'Sphere IT Solution' in Outfit font.
Do NOT use generic placeholder image URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash URLs in the assets_and_media section.
Strictly adhere to the color palette and typography scale. Do not use 'Inter'.
Ensure the hero image is not hidden behind a blanket dark overlay. Use a subtle gradient or no overlay if text is on a separate column.
